text.title: hybrid-search-basics Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to produce a tuned hybrid-search config: choose fusion, sweep alpha, run eval, freeze config, log per-leg ranks.

step.name: choose-fusion
step.action: If scales are obviously incomparable (BM25 max ≫ 1) pick RRF; if min-max normalisation is acceptable pick linear.

step.name: run-eval
step.action: Score against labeled set; capture dataset id, metric, score.

step.name: freeze-config
step.action: Write YAML matching the schema; include tie-break rule.

step.name: log-per-leg-ranks
step.action: Add dense_rank + sparse_rank fields to logged retrieval results.
